* Provide the param 'to_block' or 'to_date'
* If 'to_date' and 'to_block' are provided, 'to_block' will be used.

* If 'to_date' and 'to_block' are provided, 'to_block' will be used.

item.name: Get token balances with prices by wallet address

request.name: Get token balances with prices by wallet address

description.content: Fetch ERC20 and native token balances for a given wallet address, including their USD prices. Each token returned includes on-chain metadata, as well as off-chain metadata, logos, spam status and more. Additional options to exclude spam tokens, low-liquidity tokens and inactive tokens.

query.description: The chain to query
The block number up to which the balances will be checked.
The addresses to get balances for (optional)
The addresses to get balances for (optional)
Exclude spam tokens from the result
Exclude unverified contracts from the result
The cursor returned in the previous response (used for getting the next page).
The desired page size of the result.
Exclude native balance from the result
Exclude tokens inactive for more than the given amount of days
Exclude tokens with liquidity less than the specified amount in USD. This parameter refers to the liquidity on a single side of the pair.

variable.description: (Required) The address from which token balances will be checked

description.content: Fetch a list of tokens across multiple chains, filtered and ranked by dynamic on-chain metrics like volume, price change, liquidity, holder composition, and more. Supports advanced filters (e.g. “top 10 whales hold <40%”), category-based inclusion/exclusion (e.g. “exclude stablecoins”), and time-based analytics. Ideal for token discovery, investor research, risk analysis, and portfolio tools. Each token returned includes detailed trading metrics as well as on-chain and off-chain metadata.
